# Module specific Instructions

Whever you are working on a module, make sure to follow the instructions specific to that module. These instructions are defined in the `copilot-instructions.md` file located in the root of each module.

# Managing Documentation for various modules

Each module must maintain its own `docs` folder.
Whenever a new change is applied on a module, update that module's docs by following the documentation guideliens (`docs/guidelines.md`)for that module.
